exact_lines_areas_changed: core/risk.py constants block: added MIN_ENTRY_PRICE env-backed constant beside MAX_ENTRY_PRICE and MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE
core/risk.py check_entry_gates(): inserted ask-side minimum entry price gate immediately after the existing MAX_ENTRY_PRICE checks and before near-resolution gating
summary: Added a minimal MIN_ENTRY_PRICE gate to check_entry_gates() using the correct ask side for BUY_YES and BUY_NO. Entries with ask price below 0.15 now reject with entry_price_too_low before they can open.
verification_evidence: Patched check_entry_gates() reads ask_side = ob.ask_yes for BUY_YES else ob.ask_no for BUY_NO.
Low-price rejection reason is emitted as entry_price_too_low:{ask_side:.4f}<{MIN_ENTRY_PRICE:.4f}.
